branch.conclusion: SO strict. Pair with [[strict-mode-required-fields]] for schema invariants.
json-mode fallback; open a tracking issue to migrate when strict SO is available.
Tool call. Pair with [[structured-tool-errors]] for the error envelope.
Skip this provider for action stages; route to a provider with tool-call support or roll back to SO strict + custom router.
Grammar mode (XGrammar / Outlines / GBNF) on a local or self-hosted model.

branch.when: consumer == 'dsl' and output_is_json == true and provider.supports_so_strict == true
branch.conclusion: SO strict — the output is JSON-shaped DSL; grammar mode adds no value over schema-constrained JSON.
json-mode; document the lifecycle plan to retire this path.

example.p: Consumer `extraction`, provider `openai` (supports SO strict) → conclusion `r1-pick-by-consumer` → SO strict. Pair with strict-mode-required-fields.
